calendar.matters:
NAME CHANGE CALENDAR
Off Calendar Jul-30-2019 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for OSC hearing for Change of Name of a Minor.
Dept. 514. Judge: Gail Dekreon. Clerk: K. Dougherty. Proceedings Not Reported.

Petitioner Livier Alvarez was present in pro per.
Salvador Alvarez, the minor's father, was not present for this morning's proceedings, but did sign the petition for change of name of the minor.
Proof of Publication in the file.

No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct and sufficient, and that the petition should be granted.

The Court grants the petition for Change of Name of the Minor to Sofia Ariana Alvarez.

Decree Changing Name was submitted to and signed by the Court.
